verses.text: “Nangmah in paknamtui halna ding biakna tau khat, singkha sing tawh na bawl ding hi
A dung pi khat leh alang, a vai zong pi khat leh alang mah hi ding hi. A kikim sikli nei hi ding a, a san'na pi thum hi ding hi. A kite a tak tawh sakhat hi ding hi
Nangmah in kham citak tawh a tung leh a pang kimkot leh a kite na zut ding a, a kimkotah kham tawh a geihual na bawl ding hi
Tua biakna tau-a' dingin kham kual nih na bawl ding hi. A geihual nuai a kigal sai a pang tuakah tuate na bawl ding a, a puakna ding zawlte a khumna ding hi ding uh hi
Nangmah in singkha sing tawh a zawlte na bawl ding a, kham tawh tuate na zut ding hi
Nangmah tawh ka kituahna ding mun, thuciamna tunga a om hehpihna tokhom mai, thuciamna singkuang kiangah a om dalna puan mai-ah biakna tau na koih ding hi
Aaron in tua tungah a namtui paknamtui hal ding hi. Amah in zingsang simin meivakte a puah ciangin hal ding hi
Aaron in nitakin zong meivakte a koih ciangin tuate hal ding a, na khang tawntungun Topa' mai-ah a namtui hi tawntung ding hi
Tua tungah a siangtholo paknamtui hita leh, meihal biakna hita leh, an tawh biakna hita leh na pia kei ding hi. Tua tungah tuibuah na sung kei ding hi

Aaron in kilemna dingin khialhna hanga biakna si a kite tungah kum khatin khatvei zut ding hi. Amah in na khang tawntungun kum khatin khatvei kilemna bawl ding hi. Tua pen Topa' tungah a siangtho pen ahi hi,” a ci hi.
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Israel mite a phazah na sim ciangin amau' lakah gimna a tun' lohna dingin, a milip in a kitatkhiatna uh Topa' tungah pia ding uh hi
Mi simna-ah a kihel mi peuhmah in biakinn shekel tawh kituakin shekel lang (shekel khatah gerah sawmnih om hi), Topa' tungah biakna-in pia ding hi
Mi simna-ah a kihel, kum sawmnih panin a tungsiah peuhmah in Topa' tungah biakna pia ding hi
Note-a' ding kilemna bawlna dingin Topa biakna na piak uh ciangin a haute in shekel lang sangin a tamzaw pialo ding a, a zawngte in a tawmzaw pialo ding hi
Nomau-a' dingin kilemna bawlna ding, Topa' mai-ah Israel mite ka phawkna a hisak dingin Israel mite tung panin kilemna sum na la ding a, kikhopna buk nasepna dingin na zang ding hi,” a ci hi.
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Kisilna dingin sumngo kuang khat, leh a ngakna ding zong sumngo mah tawh bawl in. Nangmah in kikhopna buk leh biakna tau kikalah na koih ding a, tua sungah tui na koih ding hi
Aaron leh a tapate in a khut uh leh a khe uh tua tui tawh sil ding uh hi
Kikhopna bukah amaute a pai ciang uh ahi a, Topa' tungah mei tawh kihal biakna hal dingin biakna tau nai-ah a pai ciang uh ahi zongin, amaute a sih lohna dingun amaute tui tawh kisil ding uh hi
A sih khak lohna dingun a khut uh leh a khe uh sil ding uh hi. Tua pen na khang tawntungun amaute tunga kipanin amau' suanlekhakte tungah ngeina kip khat hi ding hi,” a ci hi.
Tua thamloin, Topa in Moses kiangah
“A hoihpen a namtui nate la in. Myrrh paknamtui shekel za nga leh a namtui thaksing tuazah lang, shekel za nih leh sawmnga a gik, leh a khum a namtui paknamtui za nih leh sawmnga
biakinn shekel tawh kituakin thaksing nam khat za nga, leh oliv thau bung khat
nangmah in paknamtui bawlte' bawl mah bangin a siangtho sathau nilh dingin hihte na gawm ding a, tua pen a siangtho sathau nilh hi ding hi
Nangmah in tua tawh kikhopna buk leh thuciamna singkuang
sabuai leh a nazat khempeuh, meivakkhuam leh a nazatte leh paknamtui biakna tau
meihal biakna tau a nazat khempeuh tawh, kuang leh a ngakna na zut ding hi
Tuate a siangtho pen ahih theihna dingin na siangthosak ding a, tuate a lawng peuhmah a siangtho suak ding hi
Amaute in keima tungah siampi na hong sep theihna dingun Aaron leh a tapate nangmah in sathau nilhin amaute na siangthosak ding hi
Nangmah in Israel mite kiangah, ‘Hih pen na khang tawntungun a siangtho keima sathau nilh hi ding hi
Mi mawkmawkte' pumpi tungah tua sathau kisunglo ding a, tua bangin a kigawm sathau dang na bawl kei ding uh hi. Tua pen a siangtho hi a, note-a' dingin a siangtho hi ding hi
Tua tawh a kibangin a bawl mi peuhmah ahi a, a pualam mi khatpeuh tuate a nilhsak mi peuhmah ahi zongin ama mite' kiang panin kikhenkhia ding hi, Topa in ci hi,’ ci in,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses kiangah, “A namtui nate, stakte, onikha, leh galbanum, paknamtui citak tawh a namtui nate (a tamna a kikim ciatin) la in la
paknamtui bawlte' hih bangin ci sawhin a nin baanglo, biakna paknamtui bawl in
Nangmah in kimkhat a neu mahmahin na satnen ding a, nang tawh ka kituahna ding kikhopna buk sunga thuciamna mai-ah pawlkhat na koih ding hi. Tua pen nangma-a' dingin a siangtho pen hi ding hi
A kigawmpih ngei teng tawh na bawl ding paknamtui pen note-a' dingin na bawl kei ding uh hi. Tua pen note-a' dingin Topa' tungah a siangtho hi ding hi
Tua tawh a kibangin paknamtui a bawl mi peuhmah ama mite' kiang panin kikhenkhia ding hi,” a ci hi.
